MASTER CALENDAR COURT

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2006 Advanced From Sep-01-06 To Aug-17-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANTS STEWART SEAWARD and WILLIAM SEAWARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR AS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON JULY 24, 2006. (301/PJB/DM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Drexel Bradshaw of Bradshaw and Associates, 433-4800, appearing for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Bradshaw stated that the defendants do not oppose the tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS STEWART SEAWARD and WILLIAM SEAWARD'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/DM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
